data.interface_name: Set the meter offset according to SN
data.interface_content:
##### Brief description

- Set the meter offset according to SN

##### Request URL
- ` https://openapi.alphaess.com/api/updateMeterOffsetConfigInfo `

##### Request method
- POST

##### Headers parameters
|Parameter name|Required|Type|Description|
|:---- |:---|:----- |----- |
|appId |Yes |string |Developer ID, click Development Management, select the Developer Information menu to find "Developer ID (AppID)" |
|timeStamp |Yes |long| unix timestamp, used to confirm the validity period of the request, if the request timestamp deviates from the server time by more than 300 seconds, it will be rejected. For reference, please refer to the address: https://tool.lu/timestamp/, the timestamp is accurate to seconds, a total of ten digits |
|sign |Yes |string | appId+appSecret+timestamp, SHA512 encrypted. For example: appId: alphaef7900ee81dbbce9, appSecret: c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c, timeStamp: 1676353875, before encryption: alphaef7900ee81dbbce9c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c16 76353875, after SHA512 encryption: 0f023c2287b8f6b21b0994947465f8e9de0e1542567b1735bdc6c427336b9b6406285cd94f9215c3e9af958df37fb11c2c9fe792713d8afbdb8c463359a1add8|

##### Request parameters (Json)

|Parameter name|Required|Type|Description|
|:---- |:----|:----- |----- |
|sysSn |Yes |string | System SN |
|pmOffset |Yes |int| Meter zero offset (unit: 0.1kW, range: -500kW ~500kW, default value: 0) |
|pmOffsetE1 |Yes |string| Meter offset time period 1 end time (h) |
|pmOffsetE2 |Yes |string| Meter offset time period 2 end time (h) |
|pmOffsetEn |Yes |int| Meter offset enable (1: on, 0: off) |
|pmOffsetS1 |Yes |string| Meter offset time period 1 start time (h) |
|pmOffsetS2 |Yes |string| Meter offset time period 2 start time (h) |

##### Return parameter description

|Parameter name|Type|Description|
|:----- |:-----|----- |
|code|int |Return status |
|info|string |Return information|
|data|data |Return data set|
